title: Epoxy Resins Group - Canada.ca
content:
These substances were identified for action under the Chemicals Management Plan (CMP).
- Summary of publications
Public comments on the draft screening assessment
Final screening assessment
Conclusion on section 64 criteria
Follow-up activities
Phenol, 4,4'-(1-methylethylidene)bis-, polymer with 2,2'-[(1-methylethylidene)bis(4,1-phenyleneoxymethylene)]bis[oxirane]
None planned at this time
Phenol, 4,4'-(1-methylethylidene)bis-, polymer with 2-(chloromethyl)oxirane
Oxirane, 2,2'-[(1-methylethylidene)bis(4,1-phenyleneoxymethylene)]bis-, homopolymer
Phenol, polymer with formaldehyde, glycidyl ether
Publication of the final screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 153 No. 18 .
Publication and start of 60-day public comment period on the draft screening assessment. The related notice was published in the Canada Gazette , Part I: Vol. 152, No. 12 .
These substances were previously evaluated under the Second Phase of Polymer Rapid Screening . That assessment found that the 4 epoxy resins were identified as requiring further assessment due to potential human health and/or ecological risks. Therefore, conclusions were not reached for these 4 substances in that assessment.
